Navigation.quartzDesc: Quartz Stone (90% quartz sand) & Zero Silica Stone (no silica), advanced-made. Wear/stain-resistant; Ideal for kitchen countertops, bathroom vanity tops and wall surfaces.
Navigation.terrazzoDesc: Natural aggregates + eco-adhesive, high-pressure-formed. Large slabs ease install; hard, wear-resistant, non-flammable for indoor and outdoor floors and walls.
Navigation.flexibleDesc: Stone texture + flexibility. Lightweight, easy to install on walls, floors and irregular surfaces. Toxic-free, eco-safe and suitable for modern spaces.
Navigation.marbleDesc: ZYL Marble features unique natural textures and elegant luxury, ideal for hotel lobbies, luxury mansions and high-end commercial interiors.
Navigation.gemDesc: Precision-spliced gem slices, glazed for luster. Luxurious shine and translucency for accent walls and high-end furniture tops.
Navigation.cementDesc: High-strength cement, high-pressure-made. Rich colors, stable structure and indoor or outdoor wall suitability.
Navigation.artificialDesc: Natural mineral powder + eco-friendly binders, high-temp and high-pressure formed. Wear-resistant and versatile for vanity tops, walls and facades.
Navigation.porcelainDesc: Wear-resistant, heat-resistant and eco-safe mineral slabs for walls, malls, hotels and furniture tops.
Navigation.silicaDesc: Silica-free engineered stone that preserves quartz durability while eliminating crystalline silica from the formula.

addressLines: Office & showroom: No. 7-8, 10, 11-2, 12, Block 3, Taobo 3rd Road, Huaxia Ceramic Expo City, Nanzhuang Town, Chancheng District, Foshan, Guangdong, China
Factory: Songlong Industrial Park, Baitu Town, Gaoyao District, Zhaoqing, Guangdong, China

Hero.subtitle: Providing comprehensive solutions including spot wholesale, OEM engineering, and flexible custom fabrication for residential and commercial projects.

AboutIntro.description: Founded in 2014 in Foshan, ZYL is a professional sintered stone supply chain platform integrating R&D, design, sales and service. With a 53,000 sqm modern warehouse, more than 2,000,000 sqm of ready stock, two modern production bases and one-stop fabrication support, we provide efficient slab solutions for construction, commercial interiors and home customization.

ProductsCarousel.quartzDesc: Highly durable, scratch-resistant engineered surfaces perfect for modern kitchens and commercial spaces, combining natural beauty with advanced performance.
ProductsCarousel.terrazzoDesc: Eco-friendly composite material blending diverse aggregates, offering unlimited design possibilities with exceptional durability for high-traffic areas.
ProductsCarousel.flexibleDesc: Innovative lightweight surfacing material that bends to your imagination, perfect for curved walls, columns, and creative architectural features.

SolutionTabs.kitchenDesc: Elevate your culinary space with our stain-resistant, durable quartz surfaces. Perfect for high-traffic kitchens, offering both stunning aesthetics and practical functionality.
SolutionTabs.bathroomDesc: Create a spa-like retreat with our moisture-resistant, easy-to-clean stone surfaces. Ideal for vanity tops, shower walls, and elegant flooring.
SolutionTabs.commercialDesc: Robust terrazzo and engineered stone designed to withstand the demands of retail spaces, hotels, and office building lobbies without compromising on style.
SolutionTabs.exteriorDesc: Our innovative flexible stone and specialized exterior materials provide durable, beautiful facades that endure the elements while offering unique architectural expressions.

EngineeringCase.project1Desc: Custom terrazzo flooring and quartz displays
EngineeringCase.project2Desc: Marble-effect quartz lobby and bathroom vanities

AboutIntro.title:
ABOUT
ZYL
AboutIntro.p1: Guangdong ZYL Sintered Stone Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2014 in Foshan as a professional sintered stone supply chain platform integrating R&D, design, sales and service. The company operates a 53,000 sqm modern warehouse with more than 2,000,000 sqm of ready-stock slabs.
AboutIntro.p2: Supported by two modern production bases, approximately 160,000,000 sqm of annual capacity and a professional marketing and service team of over 100 members, ZYL provides one-stop support from material selection to delivery.

item0.title: ZYL / Guangdong ZYL
item0.text: Founded in 2014, ZYL is a professional sintered stone supply chain platform integrating R&D, design, sales and service.

item1.title: 53,000 sqm Warehouse
item1.text: The company operates a 53,000 sqm modern warehouse with more than 2,000,000 sqm of ready-stock slabs for fast response.

item2.title: Foshan Office & Showroom
item2.text: The Foshan office and showroom at Huaxia Ceramic Expo City supports slab selection, business meetings and project coordination.

item3.title: Modern Production Bases
item3.text: Two modern production bases cover approximately 2,200 mu in total and support around 160,000,000 sqm of annual capacity.

item4.title: Key Equipment
item4.text: Core equipment includes the Italian SACMI 38,000-ton press, SITI 6D inkjet printing, a fully-automated wide-body precision kiln and a KEDA high-precision edging and polishing line — top-tier throughout to guarantee slab density, hardness and accuracy.

item5.title: 100+ Service Team
item5.text: A professional marketing and service team of over 100 members supports quotation, sampling, fabrication coordination and delivery.

NewsFeature.title: Why Inorganic Terrazzo Flooring Is Ideal for High-Traffic Commercial Spaces
NewsFeature.excerpt: Nowadays, modern commercial projects place far higher expectations on flooring materials than before. Whether it's a mall with nonstop foot traffic, a hospital that requires strict air-quality control, or a transport hub facing constant abrasion, the wrong material choice quickly becomes a maintenance problem.
